requirement_topic.en: EMC — Conducted and Radiated Emissions (INACAL NTP / CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-3)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——传导及辐射骚扰（INACAL NTP / CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-3）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——傳導及輻射騷擾（INACAL NTP / CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-3）

summary.en: Peru adopts international IEC and CISPR standards through INACAL (Instituto Nacional de Calidad) as Normas Técnicas Peruanas (NTP). For wireless and IoT devices, EMC conducted and radiated emission limits align with CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 / IEC 61000-3-3 (harmonic current and voltage fluctuation). EMC test reports based on these NTP/IEC-equivalent standards are expected as part of MTC homologación technical documentation.
summary.zh: 秘鲁通过INACAL（国家质量研究所）将IEC和CISPR国际标准采纳为秘鲁技术标准（NTP）。对于无线及物联网设备，传导及辐射骚扰限值与CISPR 32（多媒体设备）及IEC 61000-3-2/IEC 61000-3-3（谐波电流和电压波动）相对应。与NTP/IEC等效标准相符的EMC测试报告是MTC型式认证技术文件的组成部分。
summary.zht: 秘魯通過INACAL（國家品質研究所）將IEC和CISPR國際標準採納為秘魯技術標準（NTP）。對於無線及物聯網裝置，傳導及輻射騷擾限值與CISPR 32（多媒體設備）及IEC 61000-3-2/IEC 61000-3-3（諧波電流和電壓波動）相對應。與NTP/IEC等效標準相符的EMC測試報告是MTC型式認證技術文件的組成部分。

summary.en: China mandates EMC emissions compliance through GB 9254 (information technology equipment — conducted and radiated emissions, harmonised with CISPR 22 / CISPR 32) and GB/T 17625.1 (harmonics, harmonised with IEC 61000-3-2), both required as part of CCC certification or SRRC type approval. GB 9254 test reports are issued by CNAS-accredited labs.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 9254（信息技术设备传导及辐射骚扰，参照CISPR 22/CISPR 32）和GB/T 17625.1（谐波，参照IEC 61000-3-2）强制要求EMC合规，两者均为CCC认证或SRRC型号核准的组成部分。GB 9254测试报告由CNAS认可实验室出具。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 9254（資訊技術設備傳導及輻射騷擾，參照CISPR 22/CISPR 32）和GB/T 17625.1（諧波，參照IEC 61000-3-2）強制要求EMC合規，兩者均為CCC認證或SRRC型號核准的組成部分。GB 9254測試報告由CNAS認可實驗室出具。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 (conducted and radiated emissions — CISPR 22/32 harmonised)

gap.en: Chinese GB 9254 and CCC EMC test reports are not directly accepted as Peru NTP compliance evidence. While the underlying test parameters are IEC/CISPR-aligned, separate test reports referencing NTP/INACAL standards (or IEC standards adopted by INACAL) are expected for MTC homologación submission. Chinese exporters should confirm with MTC whether existing IEC-based test reports from accredited labs are accepted in lieu of NTP-specific reports.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254和CCC EMC测试报告不直接被接受作为秘鲁NTP合规证明。尽管基础测试参数符合IEC/CISPR，但提交MTC型式认证时须提供参照NTP/INACAL标准（或INACAL采纳的IEC标准）的独立测试报告。中国出口商应向MTC确认，来自认可实验室的现有IEC标准测试报告是否可代替NTP专项报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254和CCC EMC測試報告不直接被接受作為秘魯NTP合規證明。儘管基礎測試參數符合IEC/CISPR，但提交MTC型式認證時須提供參照NTP/INACAL標準（或INACAL採納的IEC標準）的獨立測試報告。中國出口商應向MTC確認，來自認可實驗室的現有IEC標準測試報告是否可代替NTP專項報告。

source.publisher: INACAL — Instituto Nacional de Calidad del Perú

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to IEC/CISPR standards as adopted by INACAL as NTP is required as part of MTC homologación for wireless and IoT devices in Peru. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC test reports may provide a technical basis but are not directly substitutable for Peru NTP compliance documentation; separate verification with MTC is strongly advised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EMC合规（依据INACAL以NTP形式采纳的IEC/CISPR标准）是秘鲁无线及物联网设备MTC型式认证的必要组成部分。中国GB 9254/CCC测试报告可提供技术基础，但不能直接替代秘鲁NTP合规文件；强烈建议另行与MTC确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EMC合規（依據INACAL以NTP形式採納的IEC/CISPR標準）是秘魯無線及物聯網裝置MTC型式認證的必要組成部分。中國GB 9254/CCC測試報告可提供技術基礎，但不能直接替代秘魯NTP合規文件；強烈建議另行與MTC確認。

summary.en: EMC immunity requirements for telecom and wireless terminal equipment sold in Peru are aligned with the IEC 61000-4 series (electrostatic discharge — IEC 61000-4-2; radiated immunity — IEC 61000-4-3; electrical fast transient / burst — IEC 61000-4-4; surge — IEC 61000-4-5; conducted disturbances — IEC 61000-4-6) as adopted by INACAL as NTP. These requirements are incorporated into MTC homologación technical documentation where applicable to the product category.
summary.zh: 秘鲁销售的电信及无线终端设备的EMC抗扰度要求与IEC 61000-4系列（静电放电IEC 61000-4-2；辐射抗扰度IEC 61000-4-3；电快速瞬变/脉冲群IEC 61000-4-4；浪涌IEC 61000-4-5；传导骚扰IEC 61000-4-6）相对应，该系列已由INACAL采纳为NTP。相关要求在适用于该产品类别时纳入MTC型式认证技术文件。
summary.zht: 秘魯銷售的電信及無線終端設備的EMC抗擾度要求與IEC 61000-4系列（靜電放電IEC 61000-4-2；輻射抗擾度IEC 61000-4-3；電快速瞬變/脈衝群IEC 61000-4-4；浪湧IEC 61000-4-5；傳導騷擾IEC 61000-4-6）相對應，該系列已由INACAL採納為NTP。相關要求在適用於該產品類別時納入MTC型式認證技術文件。

summary.en: China's CCC certification and SRRC type approval incorporate EMC immunity testing aligned with GB/T 17626 series (harmonised with IEC 61000-4 series). Test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories covering GB/T 17626-2 (ESD), GB/T 17626-3 (radiated immunity), GB/T 17626-4 (EFT), GB/T 17626-5 (surge), and GB/T 17626-6 (conducted) are the standard Chinese compliance evidence.
summary.zh: 中国CCC认证和SRRC型号核准纳入与GB/T 17626系列（对应IEC 61000-4系列）相符的EMC抗扰度测试。来自CNAS认可实验室涵盖GB/T 17626-2（静电放电）、GB/T 17626-3（辐射抗扰度）、GB/T 17626-4（电快速瞬变）、GB/T 17626-5（浪涌）和GB/T 17626-6（传导）的测试报告是标准中国合规证明。
summary.zht: 中國CCC認證和SRRC型號核准納入與GB/T 17626系列（對應IEC 61000-4系列）相符的EMC抗擾度測試。來自CNAS認可實驗室涵蓋GB/T 17626-2（靜電放電）、GB/T 17626-3（輻射抗擾度）、GB/T 17626-4（電快速瞬變）、GB/T 17626-5（浪湧）和GB/T 17626-6（傳導）的測試報告是標準中國合規證明。

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17626 immunity test reports are IEC-harmonised but are not directly substitutable for Peru NTP/INACAL compliance documentation. Because the underlying standards are technically equivalent to IEC 61000-4, existing IEC-based test reports from internationally accredited (ILAC MRA) labs may be accepted by MTC — exporters must confirm with MTC on a case-by-case basis.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17626抗扰度测试报告虽与IEC协调一致，但不能直接替代秘鲁NTP/INACAL合规文件。由于基础标准在技术上与IEC 61000-4等效，来自国际认可（ILAC MRA）实验室的现有IEC标准测试报告可能被MTC接受——出口商须逐案向MTC确认。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17626抗擾度測試報告雖與IEC協調一致，但不能直接替代秘魯NTP/INACAL合規文件。由於基礎標準在技術上與IEC 61000-4等效，來自國際認可（ILAC MRA）實驗室的現有IEC標準測試報告可能被MTC接受——出口商須逐案向MTC確認。

mandatory_status.target: mandatory (as part of MTC homologación where applicable)

source.publisher: INACAL — Instituto Nacional de Calidad del Perú

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity compliance to IEC 61000-4 series standards (adopted as NTP by INACAL) is expected as part of MTC homologación technical documentation for wireless and IoT devices in Peru. Chinese GB/T 17626 test reports are technically equivalent but are not directly substitutable without MTC confirmation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EMC抗扰度合规（依据INACAL以NTP形式采纳的IEC 61000-4系列标准）是秘鲁无线及物联网设备MTC型式认证技术文件的预期组成部分。中国GB/T 17626测试报告在技术上等效，但未经MTC确认不能直接替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EMC抗擾度合規（依據INACAL以NTP形式採納的IEC 61000-4系列標準）是秘魯無線及物聯網裝置MTC型式認證技術文件的預期組成部分。中國GB/T 17626測試報告在技術上等效，但未經MTC確認不能直接替代。
